title: session.go lifecycleLoop relaunch: defer unlock
description:
File: internal/session/session.go, lines 682-693

lifecycleLoop() locks the VT mutex on relaunch to reset ChildExited/ChildHung/ExitError, reset client scroll offsets, clear screen, and re-render. The unlock is manual at line 693.

Same context as the child-exit section — runs inline, no recover. A panic here would crash the daemon with a locked mutex.

Fix:
1. Convert manual vt.Mu.Unlock() to defer-based unlock (wrap in anonymous func).
2. No recover needed — inline lifecycle code, crashing is appropriate.
